summary: M473 — 15 bosses regenerated via SpriteCook (transparent pixel-art, intimidating, ~1344 SpriteCook credits used). Krix dialog skill-check now routes to node ids correctly. Stats persistence root-cause fixed (combat_history was only written at run-end; now after every fight). Stats page slot filter + per-slot count + last-50 notice. images.html + image-review-v2 lightbox unified into _shared/lightbox. Dark-border post-process fix on 18 sprites. Goblin Shaman flip override removed. Town T letter visible on revive. Load Game shows selected difficulty. Status tooltip z-index 1200 + close-on-icon-removal. Flee = no gold + end-of-round + 1/round. Dragon King reverted to pre-2x version.
